aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO but lacks critical optimizations in content, reviews, and structured data.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build a Google Business Profile with positive reviews.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords like 'HVAC services in Columbia, MD'.
Enhance the website's internal linking structure to improve crawlability and user navigation.

gbp_analysis.summary: No active Google Business Profile (GBP) was detected. The business is missing out on local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of GBP means the business is invisible in Google Maps and local search packs.
No customer reviews or ratings to build trust and credibility.
Missing opportunity to provide essential business information (hours, services, contact details) directly in search results.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or incomplete NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web, affecting local SEO performance.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Ensure consistency in NAP details, especially on the website, social media, and local directories.
Claim and verify the business on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data for services and products offered.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local searchers and potential customers using voice search or AI-driven assistants.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement FAQPage schema to address common customer queries and improve search snippets.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Leverage Organization and Service schemas to establish expertise and improve search engine understanding of the business offerings.

page_title: Home - Beltway Air Conditioning, Heating & Plumbing
